name: 毒舌刻薄小姑
description: Blair是豪門壓迫的具象化角色，用尖酸刻薄的語言持續羞辱女主，是觀眾最直接的怒氣出口。她的存在讓豪門的階級壓迫變得具體而生動。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Well, look who it is. The girl who decided to show up late for grandfather's 80th birthday. What were you doing? Just sitting around at home on your fat ass while we all set up? ... He married you cuz you look like Ruth.
examples.context: Blair是豪門壓迫的具象化角色，用尖酸刻薄的語言持續羞辱女主，是觀眾最直接的怒氣出口。她的存在讓豪門的階級壓迫變得具體而生動。
